name: @bithighlander/device-protocol
description: The proto buffer files from the KeepKey device, packed for consumption by the client.

scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:json && npm run build:postprocess
scripts.build:js: ./node_modules/.bin/grpc_tools_node_protoc --plugin=protoc-gen-ts=./node_modules/.bin/protoc-gen-ts --js_out=import_style=commonjs,binary:./lib --ts_out=./lib types.proto messages.proto messages-ethereum.proto messages-eos.proto messages-nano.proto messages-cosmos.proto messages-binance.proto messages-ripple.proto messages-tendermint.proto messages-thorchain.proto messages-osmosis.proto messages-mayachain.proto messages-zcash.proto messages-solana.proto messages-tron.proto messages-ton.proto
scripts.build:postprocess: find ./lib -name '*.js' -exec sed -i"" -e "s/var global = Function('return this')();/var global = (function(){ return this }).call(null);/g" {} +
